embedDescription:
Stay informed and never miss a beat! Use the interactive buttons below to customize your alerts and receive real-time notifications for the categories that matter most to you.

We currently offer live alerts for: Exclusive deals, High & Low value trades, Robux, and CS2 skins. Simply click the "Get alerts" button under your preferred category to join.

buttons.label: Regular Value
buttons.description: - Posts from users with 100,000+ value in Limiteds

buttons.label: Low Value
buttons.description: - Posts from users with 10,000+ value in Limiteds

buttons.label: CS2
buttons.description: - Posts from users with $100+ in CS2 skins
